paper_title: Acquisition, Processing, and Statistical Analysis of Sequence Data

methods.description: This method describes the process of extracting genomic DNA from fish muscle tissue and amplifying the complete mitochondrial genome using specific primer pairs.

steps.description: A small amount of muscle tissue was cut from each fish specimen and was used for genomic DNA extraction under high salt extraction procedures.
steps.searchable_summary: extract genomic DNA from fish muscle tissue using high salt extraction

steps.description: Primer pairs 1-13 were used to amplify the complete mitochondrial genome of G. rivuloides.
steps.searchable_summary: amplify mitochondrial genome using primer pairs

steps.description: The amplification reactions (50 µL) with 25.0 µL 2 × Es Taq MasterMix, 2.0 µL forward primers (20 µM), 2.0 µL reverse primers (20 µM), 2.0 µL genomic DNA, and 19.0 µL dd H2O were run under the following program: an initial denaturing at 94°C for 5 min, 35 cycles of 94°C for 50 s, 51.8-56.0°C for 60 s, 60°C for 70s, and a final extension at 70°C for 10 min.
steps.searchable_summary: perform PCR amplification with specified thermal cycling conditions

steps.description: The purification and Sanger sequencing of amplification products was entrusted to Jieli Biology Co., Ltd., Shanghai, China.
steps.searchable_summary: purify and sequence PCR products using Sanger sequencing

methods.description: This method involves assembling and aligning the sequenced DNA, checking for errors, and analyzing the basic characteristics of the sequences.

steps.description: The sequences were assembled using Sequencher v5.4.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble DNA sequences using Sequencher v5.4

steps.description: The sequences were then aligned with Mafft v7.427.
steps.searchable_summary: align DNA sequences using Mafft v7.427

steps.description: The aligned sequences were checked to ensure no indels or stop codons using DAMBE v6.4.100.
steps.searchable_summary: check aligned sequences for indels or stop codons using DAMBE v6.4.100

steps.description: Their basic characteristics were investigated with MEGA v7.0.26.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze basic characteristics of sequences using MEGA v7.0.26

steps.description: Cyt b haplotypes for G. rivuloides were generated using DnaSP v6.12.01 and were subsequently used in the analyses.
steps.searchable_summary: generate Cyt b haplotypes using DnaSP v6.12.01
